channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Don’t scam yourself with the tricks hackers don’t want me to share
item.description: Cybercriminals are tricking people into compromising their own technology by mimicking trusted sources; here's how to keep yourself safe from these "scam-yourself" attacks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk Donates $250M to Trump 2024 Campaign
item.description: Billionaire CEO Elon Musk makes significant donations to support President-elect Trump's campaign, sparking controversy and scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Breakthrough tech can no longer rely on CPUs
item.description: In 1993, Intel released the first Pentium processor. By today’s standards, it was primitive. At the time, it represented a major—and exciting—leap forward, even if it didn’t quite match the Macintosh’s Motorola 601 chip in sheer number-crunching performance.
item.dc:creator: Rodrigo Aramburu, Fast Company

item.title: The EU Digital Identity Wallet lands in Italy despite privacy concerns
item.description: The IT-Wallet is Italy's iteration of the EU Digital Identity Walletscheme aimed to digitalize Europeans' identity references in a single application.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Better together? Why AWS is unifying data analytics and AI services in SageMaker
item.description: Data warehousing, business intelligence, data analytics, and AI services are all coming together under one roof at Amazon Web Services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Rep. Nancy Mace Claims Censorship on Social Platform X
item.description: South Carolina Republican Rep. Nancy Mace claims her posts are being censored on social platform X, amid controversy over a proposed bill banning trans women from Capitol restrooms.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The EU makes an urgent TikTok inquiry on Russia's role in Romanian election turmoil
item.description: The European Union has sent TikTok an urgent request for more information about Romanian intelligence files suggesting that Moscow coordinated influencers on its platform to promote an election candidate who became the surprise front-runner in the nation’s presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Get ready to build your own Lego masterpieces with this new tech
item.description: Brick My World is an innovative app that allows you to turn any object into a Lego creation with your phone using advanced artificial intelligence and mobile scanning technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ally Financial finds gen AI success with 3 guiding principles
item.description: Bank holding company Ally Financial is determined to stay at the cutting edge of technology in the financial industry. Today, that means leveraging gen AI to transform its business.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: China has banned exports of key materials used for a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to produce computer chips
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Why the ‘one AI model to rule them all’ myth needs to die
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 is now in an initial rampdown phase, with the feature set frozen at 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency. JDK 24 reached the rampdown phase on December 5. It is due as a production release on March 18, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI unveils API for tracking OpenAI API usage, costs
item.description: OpenAI has introduced the Usage API, an API that allows enterprises to track their activity across the OpenAI API. With the Usage API, OpenAI API usage and costs can be assessed programmatically, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Quake prompts brief tsunami warning on the West Coast. Here's what to know about tsunamis
item.description: The powerful earthquake that struck in Northern California on Thursday prompted a brief tsunami warning affecting about 5 million people along a stretch of the West Coast — from Northern California to Oregon — before being canceled.
item.dc:creator: Mark Thiessen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple Leverages Amazon's AI Services for Enhanced Apple Intelligence
item.description: Apple utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) processors from Amazon Web Services (AWS) for its Apple Intelligence and other services, marking a significant pivot towards becoming the world's most widely deployed AI platform.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk's Neuralink expands offices in Austin area
item.description: Musk's brain-computer interface company, Neuralink, will expand in the area with more space and job openings.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Al-Shaikh, NewsNation

item.title: Cyber Monday shoppers expected to set a record on the year's biggest day for online shopping
item.description: Consumers in the United States are scouring the internet for online deals as they look to take advantage of the post-Thanksgiving shopping marathon with Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: No tennis partner? No worries with this AI robot
item.description: PongBot is an artificial intelligence-powered tennis robot and a smart training partner available to play 24 hours a day, seven days a week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
